Info

Defines ats_utilities.config_io.cfg package.

class ats_utilities.config_io.cfg.Cfg2Object(config_file: str | None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IRead

Defines class Cfg2Object with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for reading configuration from a CFG file. Conversion of CFG content to Python object.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Marks error types.
__EXT - File extension of the configuration file.
__MODE - File open mode.
__REGEX_EXP - Regular expression for matching line.
__checker - ATSChecker for check operations.
__reporter - ATSReporter for messaging.
__file_checker - FileCheck for checking file.
__file_path - Configuration file path.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Cfg2Object constructor.
read_configuration - Reads configuration from a CFG file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

__EXT: str = 'cfg'¶
__MODE: str = 'r'¶
__REGEX_EXP: str = '^\\s*$'¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
read_configuration(verbose: bool = False) → Dict[Any, Any][source]¶

Reads a configuration from a CFG file.

Parameters:

verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

Configuration object

Return type:

<Dict[Any, Any]>

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.config_io.cfg.CfgBase(info_file: str | None = None, cfg2object: IRead | None = None, object2cfg: IWrite | None = None, options_parser: ATSOptionParser | None = None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, strategy: IATSArgParseStrategy | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: object

Defines class CfgBase with attribute(s) and method(s). Loads the ATS configuration for the ATS. CFG configuration-based API support.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker mapping.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for check operations.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__file_checker - FileCheck for checking file.
__cfg2obj - In API for information.
__obj2cfg - Out API for information.
__tool_operational - Control ATS operational functionality.
__option_parser - Option parser for ATS.
methods:
__init__ - Initials CfgBase constructor.
is_tool_ok - Checks is tool operational.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

is_tool_ok() → bool[source]¶

Checks is tool operational.

Returns:

True (tool is operational) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

property option_parser: ATSOptionParser¶

Option parser for ATS.

Returns:

Option parser for ATS

Return type:

<ATSO

ptionParser> :exceptions: None

class ats_utilities.config_io.cfg.Object2Cfg(config_file: str | None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IWrite

Defines class Object2Cfg with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for writing configuration to a CFG file. Conversion of Python object to CFG content.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Marks error types.
__EXT - File extension of the configuration file.
__MODE - File open mode.
__checker - ATSChecker for check operations.
__reporter - ATSReporter for messaging.
__file_checker - FileCheck for checking file.
__file_path - Configuration file path.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Object2Cfg constructor.
write_configuration - Writes configuration to a CFG file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

__EXT: str = 'cfg'¶
__MODE: str = 'w'¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
write_configuration(config: Dict[Any, Any], verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Writes a configuration to a CFG file.

Parameters:

  • config (<Dict[Any, Any]> | <NoneType>) – Configuration object | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

True (configuration written to file) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

ATSTypeError
